mappings.rationaleAI: Persisting capacities and inclinations are fundamental aspects of human psychology covered here.
Psychology studies the persisting capacities and inclinations including intelligence, temperament, and aptitudes that shape behavior.
The mind's persisting capacities including memory, intelligence, and temperament shape enduring behavioral patterns.
Intelligence is a persisting capacity influencing human behavior.
Personality reflects persisting capacities and inclinations.
Intellectual disability affects persisting cognitive capacities.
